title: From Dawn To Eternity

sections.label: Intro
lines: From dawn’s first light to twilight’s glow,
Praise the One who reigns below and above.
He raises the humble, scatters the proud,
His name resounds, eternally vowed.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Who is like our Lord on high,
Seated beyond the vast blue sky?
He bends to see the earth below,
To lift the weary, make them whole.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: From barren lands to fields that bloom,
From silent hearts to joy-filled rooms.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lift His name, high above,
The heavens sing of endless love.
From the rising sun to setting flame,
Forever praised, His holy name.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He sets the lowly on their throne,
The orphan finds a family, a home.
The desolate rejoice, their sorrows cease,
In His embrace, eternal peace.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: From east to west, the anthem flies,
The praise of nations fills the skies.
Every soul, in awe, proclaims,
The boundless power of His name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lift His name, high above,
The heavens sing of endless love.
From the rising sun to setting flame,
Forever praised, His holy name.

sections.label: Outro
lines: From dawn’s first light to twilight’s glow,
The song of praise will ever grow.

epigraph: praise the name of the LORD
